noLedgerDesc: Ledgers may have failed to load. Refresh or sign in again.
daysDailyN/a: Days left and daily allowance apply only when viewing the current calendar month.
title: Dashboard
familyMergeHighlight: the family ledger + {{count}} linked personal ledgers
familyMergeSuffix: (including linked members’ personal entries without opening their books). The monthly “ledger total budget” is the family ledger’s budget only, compared to combined spending (sub-ledger budgets are not summed here).
familyMergePending: Personal ledgers are linked; refresh to update aggregates.
tagEmptyHint: No tags yet. Create them under
tagEmptyEnd: to exclude/include amounts in analytics (e.g. reimbursements, transfers).
tagTooltipDefault: This tag is marked “exclude from stats” under Categories → Tags; use the toggle above.
tagTooltipRestore: Click to include in stats again
emptyHintProject: Link transactions to a project to see its share here.
emptyHintLedger: Switch to “All ledgers” and add more ledgers to see per-ledger shares.
emptyHintCategory: Add your first expense to see category shares.
recentDescMerged: Family + all linked personal ledgers, latest 5
recentEmptyDesc: Use “Add entry” in the header to start
spendChartEmptyDesc: Add an expense to see the breakdown
categoryDrillEmpty: No per-ledger breakdown for this selection
